name: auto-annotation-workflows
description: Repo-local slash commands for the auto-annotation research workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Slash commands for sync, evaluation, rendering, implementation, and literature-backed proposals.
interface.longDescription: Research-specific Codex commands for this repository. The commands sync latest annotation runs from kiwi, compare against manual labels, generate trajectory input previews, implement focused improvements, and produce literature-backed remediation reports with repo-specific paths and guardrails baked in.
